StateTitles: Checkout - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given the user clicks the cart icon, then they are taken to a checkout wizard consisting of numbered steps: Cart, Sign in, Billing address, Payment.
Given the user proceeds from the cart step, when they are not authenticated, then the checkout wizard displays a Sign in step where the user must log in or register before continuing.
Given the user completes the billing step, then the Payment step asks for payment information and confirms the order.

Given the user has signed in, when they reach the Billing address step, then the page collects shipping and billing details (name, address, city, province, country etc.) similar to the registration form.
Given the user is on the cart step, when they change the quantity or remove an item, then the cart totals update accordingly.

StateTitles: Forgot Password - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given a user has forgotten their password, when they click Forgot password? on the login page, then they are taken to the password reset form.
Given the user enters their email on the Forgot password page and clicks Set new password, then the system sends a password-reset link to their email address.
Given an existing user enters a valid email and password and clicks Sign in, then they are authenticated and redirected to their account or the last page they were on.
Given the user selects Sign in from the header, then a login form appears with fields for email and password, a Google sign-in button, and a password visibility toggle icon.
Given the user enters a password during registration, then a strength meter updates from Weak to Excellent based on length, uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers and special characters.
Given the password field in the registration form, then guidelines are displayed below specifying minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase and lowercase letter, one number and one special symbol.

Given a new user fills in the registration form with required personal details (first name, last name, date of birth, street, postcode, city, province, telephone, email), selects their country from a drop-down, provides a password and submits, then the account is created and the user can log in.

Given an existing user enters a valid email and password and clicks Sign in, then they are authenticated and redirected to their account or the last page they were on.
Given a user has forgotten their password, when they click Forgot password? on the login page, then they are taken to the password reset form.
Given the user enters their email on the Forgot password page and clicks Set new password, then the system sends a password-reset link to their email address.

Given a new user fills in the registration form with required personal details (first name, last name, date of birth, street, postcode, city, province, telephone, email), selects their country from a drop-down, provides a password and submits, then the account is created and the user can log in.
Given the password field in the registration form, then guidelines are displayed below specifying minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase and lowercase letter, one number and one special symbol.

StateTitles: Contact Us - Practice Software Testing - Toolshop - v5.0
SiblingTexts: Only files with the extension are allowed, and files must be 0kb.

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given the user selects Contact in the header, then a contact form appears with fields for first name, last name, email, subject drop-down, message text area and file attachment.
Given mandatory fields (first name, email, subject, message) are missing from the contact form, then the form shows error messages and prevents submission.
Given all required fields are completed of the contact page, when the user clicks Send, then the message is sent and a confirmation appears.

Given a new user fills in the registration form with required personal details (first name, last name, date of birth, street, postcode, city, province, telephone, email), selects their country from a drop-down, provides a password and submits, then the account is created and the user can log in.
Given the contact form, when the user expands the subject drop-down and chooses a topic, then the selected subject is recorded for the message.
Given a user on the catalogue, when they tick a brand under By brand, then the list displays only items made by the chosen brand.

Given the user has signed in, when they reach the Billing address step, then the page collects shipping and billing details (name, address, city, province, country etc.) similar to the registration form.

TopRequirements.Requirement: Given a category contains no products (Special Tools), when the user views that category page, then the page clearly states "No products found" instead of showing an empty grid.

Given the user selects Rentals from the categories menu, then the Rentals page displays cards for available items such as Excavator, Bulldozer and Crane with images and descriptive text.
Given the user types a search term in the Search field and presses the "Search" button, then the catalogue displays products whose names or descriptions match the query.
Given the user enters a password during registration, then a strength meter updates from Weak to Excellent based on length, uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers and special characters.
